points.label: Mission alignment
points.description: Keep the change tied to CEO goals, current plan and measurable system impact.

points.label: Section objective
points.description: Define exactly what Sources should do better after the upgrade.

points.label: Improvement trigger
points.description: Preserve the arrow-up trigger and make the generated proposal visible in the brainstorming backlog.

points.label: Prompt linkage
points.description: Attach the generated prompt to the original brainstorming item with a visible P action.

points.label: Status workflow
points.description: Support open, selected, in progress, done and archived states for improvement ideas.

points.label: Structured artifact
points.description: Save title, source section, current state, problems, ideas, impact, tools, agents, steps, priority and status.

points.label: Intel storage
points.description: Persist analysis selections in INTEL / brainstorming and final prompts in INTEL / brainstorming / prompts.

points.label: Traceability
points.description: Keep stable IDs between source idea, analysis, selected points and generated prompt.

points.label: Popup tabs
points.description: Use a compact tabbed popup with checkbox groups for goals, features, data, UX, risks and implementation.

points.label: Copy action
points.description: Expose a copy button next to the final prompt so it can be reused instantly.

points.label: Scope control
points.description: Avoid broad redesign and keep the change inside existing architecture and UI patterns.

points.label: Missing data fallback
points.description: If live data is incomplete, mark assumptions and still produce a safe interim prompt.

points.label: API routes
points.description: Add server endpoints for listing proposals, creating analyses, saving selections and generating prompts.

points.label: Client refresh
points.description: Refresh the listing after every analysis, prompt creation or status update.

points.label: Verification
points.description: Run lint or build after implementation and document any blocker.
